implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: UI component that collects task details (title, description, priority, due date, category) from the user and triggers the task creation process via onSubmit.
implementation.name: TaskForm
implementation.pseudo_code:
Render a form with fields for title, description, priority, category, and due date
On form submission:
    IF all required fields are filled
        Call onSubmit with the task details
    ELSE
        Show validation errors

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Function that sends a POST request to the backend to create a new task with the provided details.
implementation.name: api.createTask
implementation.pseudo_code:
Receive task details as input
Send POST request to /tasks endpoint with task data
IF response is successful
    Return created task
ELSE
    Throw error

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: FastAPI endpoint that receives task creation requests, validates input, and delegates creation to the database layer.
implementation.name: create_task
implementation.pseudo_code:
On POST /tasks with TaskCreate payload:
    Call database.add_task with the task data
    Return the created task

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Function that generates a unique task ID, stores the new task in the database, and returns the created task.
implementation.name: add_task
implementation.pseudo_code:
Get current list of tasks
Generate unique ID for new task
Create Task object with provided details
Append new task to list
Return new task

missing_implementations: User_name field is not present in the UI form, frontend API, backend endpoint, or database logic. The feature does not allow users to specify or capture user_name for new tasks.
